newsEvents.post1Headline: BanavatNest Proud Sponsor of the Quiz Competition at ROFT-2026, TIET
newsEvents.post1Body: BanavatNest Pvt. Ltd. was proud to sponsor the Quiz Competition at ROFT-2026, organized by the Department of Mathematics, Thapar Institute of Engineering & Technology. The event witnessed enthusiastic participation, reflecting strong curiosity and engagement among the participants.
newsEvents.post2Headline: Deployment Site Finalized for Patented Smart Fish-Feeding System
newsEvents.post2Body: BanavatNest Pvt. Ltd. has finalized the deployment site for the field study of its solar-powered automated floating fish-feeding system. We are proud that one of our Founder Directors is the inventor associated with this patented technology.
newsEvents.post3Body:
Experience the beauty of the Full Moon through guided photography and observation sessions hosted by BanavatNest. The platform will provide telescope access, lenses, and camera support to help participants capture detailed moon photographs. Selected entries will receive exciting prizes and recognition.

Venue: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (TIET), Patiala

featuredInnovations.inn1Body: A patented smart aquaculture innovation invented by one of our directors, focused on automated and sustainable fish feeding through an integrated solar-powered floating assembly system designed for efficient aquaculture management.
featuredInnovations.inn2Body: A patented integrated farming innovation invented by one of our directors, designed to support sustainable aquaculture and livestock management through automated, intelligent, and resource-efficient shelter and pond integration systems.
featuredInnovations.inn3Body: A research-driven intelligent assisting innovation focused on automated and efficient food-picking support through adaptive sensing, smart handling mechanisms, and user-oriented design for enhanced accessibility and practical usability.
featuredInnovations.inn4Body: Building secure and scalable software solutions for intelligent financial analytics, automation, monitoring, and decision-support applications.
featuredInnovations.inn5Body: A smart and sustainable irrigation solution designed for automated plant watering through solar-powered operation, intelligent monitoring, and efficient water management for precision agriculture and smart farming applications.
featuredInnovations.inn6Body: Developing research-driven and technology-oriented customized solutions tailored to specific industry, academic, automation, analytics, and real-world operational requirements.
featuredInnovations.inn7Body: Designing intelligent and technology-driven healthcare solutions focused on solving real-world clinical, monitoring, automation, and patient-care challenges through research, innovation, and system-oriented development.

collaborationPage.heroQuote: BanavatNest Pvt. Ltd. — where research meets prototypes, and prototypes move toward real-world impact.
collaborationPage.whoCanDesc: Open to students, faculty, researchers, startups, and industry partners driven by innovation and real-world impact.
collaborationPage.journeyHeadline: Transforming curiosity-driven ideas into practical, scalable, and impactful real-world solutions.
collaborationPage.approachP1: We adopt a problem-driven approach where real-world industry challenges are mapped into academic research opportunities and student-led innovation projects. Collaboration is enabled through joint supervision, milestone-based execution, continuous mentoring, and prototype-driven development.
collaborationPage.approachP2: Our ecosystem encourages interdisciplinary collaboration where ideas evolve through research, experimentation, prototyping, and continuous innovation.

aboutUsPage.title: About
aboutUsPage.subtitle: Research-led innovation nurturing ideas from curiosity to impact.
aboutUsPage.coreValuesSubheading: Building the future through purposeful innovation and systematic development.
aboutUsPage.coreValuesIntro: At <brand>BanavatNest</brand>, we believe innovation is not just about ideas -- it is about nurturing them through Purpose, Process, and Prototyping until they create meaningful Progress.

aboutName.title: Our
aboutName.subtitle: Symbolizing the philosophy of creation and nurturing innovation.
aboutName.banavatDesc: Drawn from Hindi and widely used in Punjabi, Banavat signifies creating, building, and shaping ideas with purpose and intent.
aboutName.nestDesc: A Nest symbolizes a nurturing space where ideas are developed, refined, and prepared to grow into meaningful impact.
aboutName.sloganText: Build with Purpose. Nurture to Impact.
aboutName.closingStatement: BanavatNest is not just a name—it is our commitment to shaping ideas through research and prototyping, transforming them into real-world impact.
aboutName.quote: Together, BanavatNest represents a research-led innovation ecosystem where curiosity-driven ideas are shaped through systematic investigation.

aboutPhilosophy.title: Philosophy
aboutPhilosophy.subtitle: A unified philosophy where ideas are built with purpose and nurtured with care.
aboutPhilosophy.b_desc: Focusing on purposeful creation to address meaningful challenges.
aboutPhilosophy.a1_desc: Rigorous analysis, critical reasoning, and evidence-based decision-making.
aboutPhilosophy.n1_desc: Encouraging exploration, questioning, and continuous learning.
aboutPhilosophy.a2_desc: Staying flexible and responsive to new ideas and emerging technologies.
aboutPhilosophy.v_desc: Refining ideas through systematic experimentation and iterative improvement.
aboutPhilosophy.a3_desc: Integrity, responsibility, and ethical conduct are central.
aboutPhilosophy.t_desc: Translating research outcomes into practical, scalable solutions.
aboutPhilosophy.nest_n_desc: Supportive environment where ideas are encouraged and allowed to mature.
aboutPhilosophy.nest_e_desc: Learning through experimentation and evidence-based validation.
aboutPhilosophy.nest_s_desc: Fostering collaboration across disciplines for shared problem-solving.
aboutPhilosophy.nest_t_desc: Working together to deliver meaningful and lasting impact.

aboutMission.title: Mission
aboutMission.subtitle: Research-driven innovation nurturing ideas from curiosity to impact.
aboutMission.missionText: To transform purposeful ideas into practical and scalable solutions through research, design, and prototyping.
aboutMission.visionText: To build a research-driven innovation ecosystem where ideas evolve from curiosity to meaningful real-world impact.

aboutTeam.title: Our
aboutTeam.subtitle: Collaborative ecosystem of students, scholars, and experts.
aboutTeam.intro: At BanavatNest, we follow a collaborative and inclusive team model rather than a conventional in-house service-based structure.
aboutTeam.studentsDesc: Contribute through project-based learning, exploratory research, and prototype development.
aboutTeam.facultyDesc: Role as mentors, domain experts, and research leaders, guiding projects with academic rigor.
aboutTeam.partnersDesc: Bring real-world problems and deployment perspectives for impactful outcomes.
aboutTeam.quote: "We act as a bridge between academia, industry, and society, enabling collaborative innovation."

aboutBoard.sukhdevBio: A passionate researcher and strategic visionary with deep expertise in transforming complex ideas into scalable technological solutions.
aboutBoard.sukhdevAch1: Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering from IIT Patna.
aboutBoard.sukhdevAch2: Pioneered research in AI, IoT & Smart Systems.
aboutBoard.sukhdevAch3: Published numerous patents & high-impact research papers.
aboutBoard.sangitaBio: An innovative technologist and academician dedicated to developing sustainable, research-led prototypes with real-world industry applications.
aboutBoard.sangitaAch1: Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering from IIT Patna.
aboutBoard.sangitaAch2: Expertise in Machine Learning & Health Informatics.
aboutBoard.sangitaAch3: Led multiple technology transfer initiatives & prototype developments.

focusAreas.title: Our Focus
focusAreas.subtitle: Bridging the gap between theoretical research and practical application.
focusAreas.rdDesc: Systematic investigation and analytical modeling to solve real-world problems with scalable solutions.
focusAreas.protoDesc: Integrating design and engineering to translate ideas into functional, industrial-grade prototypes.
focusAreas.acadDesc: Enabling student-driven projects and faculty-led innovation through active industry partnering.
focusAreas.techDesc: Transforming research into deployable technologies through IP development and commercialization.

researchDomains.title: Our
researchDomains.subtitle: Diverse expertise driving technological advancement across impactful industries.
researchDomains.aiDesc: Intelligent algorithms for prediction and optimization across engineering and health sectors.
researchDomains.cyberDesc: Secure and decentralized systems for connected environments. Addressing network security and privacy.
researchDomains.smartDesc: Integrating sensing and automation for resource-efficient technologies and improved quality of life.
researchDomains.agriDesc: Advanced data analytics and IoT monitoring to enhance farming productivity and sustainability.

opportunities.title: Student
opportunities.subtitle: Creating research and innovation opportunities for students at all levels.
opportunities.getStudentsDesc: More than an internship — a launchpad for your future career and research journey.
opportunities.benefit1Desc: Work on real industry and research problems that create measurable impact.
opportunities.benefit2Desc: Take your idea from concept → design → fully working model.
opportunities.benefit3Desc: Explore AI, Cybersecurity, IoT, Blockchain, and Smart Systems.
opportunities.benefit4Desc: Guidance from leading figures across academia and industry.
opportunities.benefit5Desc: Earn certificates, showcase projects, and receive recommendation letters.
opportunities.innovationItem2: Convert your idea into a prototype
opportunities.eligibilityItem3: Passionate learners — skills matter more than marks
opportunities.selectionStep1Desc: Fill out the application form with your interests.
opportunities.selectionStep2Desc: We review your ideas and areas of interest.
opportunities.selectionStep3Desc: A friendly conversation about your goals.
opportunities.selectionStep4Desc: Selected candidates are notified and onboarded.
opportunities.ugDesc: Engage through exploratory projects, internships, and innovation challenges aimed at skill development and early research exposure.
opportunities.pgDesc: Work on advanced problem-solving, system design, and prototype development aligned with industry needs.
opportunities.phdDesc: Supported through industry-relevant research problems, joint supervision, access to real datasets, and opportunities for funded research.

facultyPage.title: Faculty
facultyPage.subtitle: Central to our ecosystem as domain experts, mentors, and principal investigators.
facultyPage.heading: Leading interdisciplinary teams and guiding research with impact.
facultyPage.bodyP1: BanavatNest enables faculty engagement through joint research projects, consultancy, sponsored research, and co-development of intellectual property.
facultyPage.bodyP2: Faculty members are encouraged to lead interdisciplinary teams, guide student researchers, and contribute to grant proposals and pilot deployments. This engagement fosters meaningful research impact while strengthening institutional collaboration with industry.

industryPartnerships.title: Industry
industryPartnerships.subtitle: Demonstrating technical feasibility and business potential through Proof-of-Concepts (PoCs).
industryPartnerships.heading: Collaborating to develop solutions that demonstrate real-world impact.
industryPartnerships.bodyP1: Industry partners benefit from rapid prototyping, academic validation, and access to skilled talent, while academic participants gain exposure to real-world constraints and deployment challenges.
industryPartnerships.successNote: Successful PoCs can progress toward technology transfer, startup incubation, or long-term industry adoption.

contact.title: Get in
contact.subtitle: We're always looking for new ideas, partnerships, and collaborations.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: All information provided on this website is for informational purposes only. While every effort is made to ensure that the information presented is current and accurate, BanavatNest makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of the information.
disclaimer.p2: This website may contain information and links provided by various internal or external sources. BanavatNest does not independently verify, monitor, or guarantee the authenticity of such information and does not endorse, control, or assume responsibility for the content of any external websites or linked resources. Any reliance placed on the information available through this website is strictly at the user's own risk.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BanavatNest Private Limited ("BanavatNest", "we", "our", or "us") respects the privacy of all users, collaborators, students, researchers, startups, faculty members, and industry partners interacting with our platform. This Privacy Policy explains how information shared with us may be collected, used, and protected.
privacy.s1Text: We may receive information voluntarily shared with us through our website, forms, email communications, workshops, collaboration channels, or other interactions. Such information may include, but is not limited to:
privacy.s1Item4: Documents, files, research materials, or datasets
privacy.s2Text: Information shared with BanavatNest may be used for purposes including:
privacy.s2Item6: Improving our services, programs, and innovation ecosystem
privacy.s3Text: BanavatNest does not sell personal or submitted information to third parties. We do not disclose or externally share submitted information without prior consent, except:
privacy.s3Item2: where necessary for agreed collaborations, or
privacy.s3Item3: where limited sharing is required among participating team members, mentors, researchers, faculty collaborators, or students on a need-to-know basis and under responsible professional practices.
privacy.s4Text: BanavatNest respects the confidentiality of information shared with us. However, submission through our website, forms, email, or communication channels does not automatically establish a confidential or legally protected relationship. Users are advised not to share highly sensitive, proprietary, confidential, or trade-secret information unless a formal written agreement (such as a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)) has been executed.
privacy.s5Text: Users are responsible for ensuring that submitted content does not violate:
privacy.s5Footer: Do not submit confidential or protected material belonging to others without proper authorization.
privacy.s6Text: BanavatNest takes reasonable administrative and technical precautions to help protect submitted information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is completely secure, and absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
privacy.s7Text: Our website may contain links to external websites or third-party platforms. BanavatNest is not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such external sites.
privacy.s8Text: BanavatNest may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updated versions will be posted on this page. Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.s9Text: For questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By accessing, browsing, submitting information to, or using the BanavatNest platform, website, forms, or collaboration channels, you agree to these Terms of Use.
terms.s1Text: BanavatNest operates as a research-driven innovation and collaboration platform. Engagements are exploratory in nature and intended to support research-led problem solving, experimentation, prototyping, and innovation.
terms.s2Text: Users confirm that any ideas, problem statements, data, documents, or materials shared through the platform are original to the best of their knowledge, or that they possess lawful permission to share them. Users agree not to knowingly submit content copied from proprietary, copyrighted, confidential, restricted, or unauthorized sources.
terms.s3Text: BanavatNest undertakes research, experimentation, and development based on independent scientific, technical, analytical, and collaborative processes. Unless explicitly agreed otherwise in writing, solutions, concepts, prototypes, or research outcomes generated through the platform may arise from independent analysis, experimentation, simulations, prototyping, validation, and collaborative exploration.
terms.s4Text: Users agree not to submit content that infringes intellectual property rights, trade secrets, confidentiality obligations, or proprietary rights belonging to others. BanavatNest is not responsible for independently verifying the originality, ownership, legality, or authorization status of user-submitted content.
terms.s5Text: Research and innovation activities are inherently exploratory and uncertain in nature. Submission of a problem statement, idea, or collaboration request does not guarantee:
terms.s5Footer: Research activities may result in partial findings, experimental insights, alternative directions, or exploratory outcomes rather than production-ready solutions.
terms.s6Text: Ownership, licensing, authorship, acknowledgment, publication rights, commercialization rights, and usage permissions relating to submitted ideas, collaborative work, research outputs, or resulting innovations shall be governed by mutually agreed terms or separate written agreements, where applicable. No transfer of intellectual property rights, exclusivity, partnership, or ownership is implied solely through submission or interaction on the platform.
terms.s7Text: BanavatNest may currently be engaged in, or may independently develop, ideas, methods, technologies, prototypes, or solutions similar to those submitted by users, without obligation or liability, provided no confidential or proprietary information is improperly used.
terms.s8Text: Submission through the platform does not automatically establish a confidential, fiduciary, partnership, employment, or legally protected relationship. If sensitive, proprietary, or confidential disclosure is required, users should request a formal written agreement (such as an NDA) before sharing detailed confidential information.
terms.s9Text: Ideas, problem statements, and research directions shared through the platform may contribute to:
terms.s9Footer: Any publication, presentation, acknowledgment, or public disclosure arising from such work shall follow responsible and ethical academic and professional practices and, where applicable, mutually agreed terms.
terms.s10Text: Where feasible, BanavatNest may assign well-scoped micro-problems, innovation tasks, or research activities to students, scholars, researchers, faculty members, or collaborators. Honoraria, incentives, acknowledgments, timelines, deliverables, and engagement terms may be defined separately for individual activities or collaborations.
terms.s11Title: 11. Right to Accept or Decline Engagement
terms.s11Text: BanavatNest reserves the right to accept, defer, limit, suspend, or decline any submission, proposal, or engagement based on factors including feasibility, ethical considerations, legal constraints, resource availability, or alignment with organizational objectives and values.
terms.s12Text: Users agree not to use the platform for unlawful, unethical, harmful, deceptive, or malicious purposes. BanavatNest supports responsible research, innovation, technology development, and ethical collaboration practices.
terms.s13Text: Any discussions, research insights, technical suggestions, experimental findings, or exploratory recommendations provided through BanavatNest are informational and research-oriented in nature. Such content shall not be construed as legal, financial, medical, regulatory, or other professional advice.
terms.s14Text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, BanavatNest shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or third-party claims arising from:
terms.s14Item2: reliance on research outcomes or experimental findings,
terms.s14Item4: disputes related to user submissions or intellectual property claims.
terms.s15Text: BanavatNest may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Updated versions will be posted on this page. Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.s16Text: These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising in connection with these Terms or the use of the platform shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts in Punjab, India.
terms.s17Text: For questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact:
